en.text: The raising of both hands by the Imam during Istisqa' while invoking Allah for rain

ar.text: باب رَفْعِ الإِمَامِ يَدَهُ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ

حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى، وَابْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ، عَنْ سَعِيدٍ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم لاَ يَرْفَعُ يَدَيْهِ فِي شَىْءٍ مِنْ دُعَائِهِ إِلاَّ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ، وَإِنَّهُ يَرْفَعُ حَتَّى يُرَى بَيَاضُ إِبْطَيْهِ‏.‏

al.text: Transmeton Enes bin Maliku: Pejgamberi (s.a.v.s.) nuk i ngrinte duart në asnjë prej lutjeve të tij, përveç lutjes për shi (Istiska), dhe i ngrinte ato aq lart saqë i shihej bardhësia e sqetullave të tij.

en.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) never raised his hands for any invocation except for that of Istisqa' and he used to raise them so much that the whiteness of his armpits became visible. (Note: It may be that Anas did not see the Prophet (ﷺ) raising his hands, but it is narrated that the Prophet (ﷺ) used to raise his hands for invocations other than Istisqa. See Hadith No. 807 & 808 and also see Hadith No. 612, Vol. 5).
